assertions.assertion: Mentions DefaultClockSkew as the relevant setting
assertions.rationale: Explicitly identifies DefaultClockSkew as the relevant setting.

assertions.assertion: Suggests increasing the value beyond the default 5 minutes
assertions.rationale: Mentions default is 5 minutes and suggests increasing to 10 minutes.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest changes to the OIDC/OAuth configuration — this is SAML-specific
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'This is SAML-specific' and does not suggest OIDC/OAuth changes.
